note: Calma control-plane proof-signing PUBLIC keys. Pin THESE to verify a /v1/verifications/{id}/proof DSSE envelope offline (by the signature's keyid). `current` signs new proofs; `trusted` includes retired keys so historical proofs still verify. The private keys never leave the deployment (KMS is non-exportable). Also served at https://calma-api-wheat.vercel.app/v1/signing-key. Verify with control_plane/verify_proof.py.

trusted.note: pre-KMS env-seed key; verifies proofs issued before the KMS cutover
